allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge local-modifications: Add Gemini image generation features

Resolved conflicts by preferring upstream changes for:
- Project configuration \(project.pbxproj, Info.plist\)
- Core services and API configurations
- UI components and ViewModels

Preserved local enhancements:
- GeminiImageGenService.swift
- GeminiGenViewModel.swift
- GeminiGenView.swift
- Various UI improvements in Gallery, Stream, Settings views

Note: Gemini files need to be added to Xcode project manually

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(rm -rf ./build && mkdir -p ./build && xcodebuild archive \\
  -project CameraAccess.xcodeproj \\
  -scheme TurboMeta \\
  -archivePath ./build/CameraAccess.xcarchive \\
  -configuration Release \\
  -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' \\
  CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="Apple Development" \\
  DEVELOPMENT_TEAM="3NUT9SN8XW" 2>&1 | tail -5 && \\
xcodebuild -exportArchive \\
  -archivePath ./build/CameraAccess.xcarchive \\
  -exportPath ./build \\
  -exportOptionsPlist ExportOptions.plist 2>&1 | tail -3 && \\
ls -lh ./build/*.ipa)
